title: Draft invoice totals GET schema
description: A schema for retrieval of the totals of draft invoices for a single customer and acccounting year.

netAmountInBaseCurrency.description: The total invoice amount for all draft invoices in the base currency of the agreement before all taxes and discounts have been applied.

customers.description: A reference to the draft invoices totals customers resource.

periods.description: A reference to the draft invoices totals periods resource.

accountingYear.title: Accounting year
accountingYear.description: A specific accounting year on the agreement.

year.description: The calendar year or years spanned by the accounting year in the format YYYY or YYYY/YYYY.

self.description: A unique link reference to the accounting year item.
A reference to the current resource.
